1) Implementation approach (short)  
To address the Gemini model’s strict image count limit during summarization, modify the summarization prompt construction to detect images in the conversation history and replace them with standardized placeholders (e.g., “[Image omitted]”). This ensures the prompt contains only text, preventing image count overflow. Update the summarization pipeline to preprocess conversation content accordingly before sending it to the model.
